prompts.name: Mountain Range
prompts.text: Set the scene before a vast mountain range with layered peaks, atmospheric depth, and clean natural light.

prompts.name: Waterfall
prompts.text: Place the subject near a waterfall with mist, rushing water, wet stones, and lush surrounding vegetation.

prompts.name: Crystal Lake
prompts.text: Use a crystal-clear lake reflecting sky, trees, or mountains, with calm water and peaceful natural beauty.

prompts.name: Forest Path
prompts.text: Create a forest path with moss, trees, filtered sunlight, fallen leaves, and a quiet sense of discovery.

prompts.name: Bamboo Grove
prompts.text: Place the scene in a bamboo grove with tall green stalks, soft filtered light, and a serene atmosphere.

prompts.name: Wildflower Meadow
prompts.text: Use a meadow filled with wildflowers, soft grass, open sky, and a bright seasonal atmosphere.

prompts.name: Desert Dunes
prompts.text: Create rolling desert dunes with warm sand, long shadows, dry air, and strong natural shapes.

prompts.name: Sea Cliffs
prompts.text: Place the scene on coastal cliffs overlooking the ocean with wind, waves, and dramatic natural scale.

prompts.name: Riverbank
prompts.text: Set the scene beside a flowing river with stones, reeds, trees, and gentle reflective light.

prompts.name: Snowy Forest
prompts.text: Create a snowy forest with frosted branches, quiet white ground, and cold peaceful atmosphere.

prompts.name: Tropical Jungle
prompts.text: Use a dense tropical jungle with huge leaves, vines, humid atmosphere, and rich green detail.

prompts.name: Volcanic Landscape
prompts.text: Create a volcanic landscape with black rock, distant lava glow, smoke, and dramatic geological forms.

prompts.name: Canyon
prompts.text: Set the scene in a wide canyon with layered stone walls, warm light, and grand natural depth.

prompts.name: Cave
prompts.text: Place the scene inside a natural cave with rock formations, soft shafts of light, and atmospheric depth.

prompts.name: Flower Field
prompts.text: Create a large flower field with colorful blossoms, gentle wind, and a cheerful open-air feeling.
